texto: So often, we had the tendency of saying, they're the problem. No, they're not the problem. Our heart is the problem. they are just there to show me what is in my heart. They don't put those things in my heart. They don't put the wrath, the bitterness in my heart. Those things are already there. They are the vessels God uses to to release what is in my heart so that I am aware of how black my heart really is.
explicacao: Citação de Lowell Nelson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “So often, we had the tendency of saying, they're the problem. No, they're not the problem. Our he…” articula amor, relationships, repentance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e repentance.
